```html
/* ------ Session-level cost tracking ------ */

let findSessionCost = 0;

function addToFindSessionCost(delta) {
  findSessionCost += (delta || 0);
  const el = document.getElementById('findTotalCost');
  if (findSessionCost > 0) {
    el.style.display = 'inline-block';
    el.textContent = 'Session: $' + findSessionCost.toFixed(4);
  }
}

function resetFindSessionCost() {
  findSessionCost = 0;
  const el = document.getElementById('findTotalCost');
  el.style.display = 'none';
  el.textContent = '$0.0000';
}

/* ------ Per-tag card renderer (new 3-ref layout) ------ */

function appendFindResult(tag) {
  const root = document.getElementById('findResults');
  const card = document.createElement('div');
  card.className = 'tag-card';

  let html = '';
  // Header line: raw tag + inserted badge + paragraph
  html += '<div class="tag-header">';
  html += '<span><b>' + esc(tag.raw) + '</b> &nbsp;·&nbsp; ¶' + tag.paragraph + '</span>';
  if (tag.inserted) {
    html += '<span class="badge badge-inserted">✓ inserted</span>';
  } else if (tag.error) {
    html += '<span class="badge badge-noinsert">✗ not inserted</span>';
  }
  html += '</div>';

  // Context excerpt
  html += '<div class="excerpt">' + esc(tag.excerpt || '') + '…</div>';

  if (tag.error) {
    html += '<details><summary class="err">Error — show details</summary><pre>' + esc(tag.error) + '</pre></details>';
  } else if (!tag.refs || !tag.refs.length) {
    html += '<div class="hint">No references returned.</div>';
  } else {
    // Render the three refs in order: orig, rev, contra
    tag.refs.forEach(ref => {
      const badgeClass = 'badge-' + ref.kind;
      const badgeLabel = ref.kind === 'orig' ? 'original ✓'
                       : ref.kind === 'rev'  ? 'review ✓'
                       :                       'contradicts ✗';
      html += '<div class="ref ' + ref.kind + '">';
      html += '<div class="ref-title">';
      if (ref.url) {
        html += '<a href="' + esc(ref.url) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' + esc(ref.title) + '</a>';
      } else {
        html += esc(ref.title);
      }
      html += '</div>';
      html += '<div class="ref-meta">';
      html += '<span class="badge ' + badgeClass + '">' + badgeLabel + '</span>&nbsp;';
      html += esc(ref.author) + (ref.year != null ? ' ' + ref.year : '');
      if (ref.venue) html += ' · <i>' + esc(ref.venue) + '</i>';
      if (ref.doi) html += ' · DOI: ' + esc(ref.doi);
      html += '</div>';
      if (ref.justification) {
        html += '<div class="ref-just">' + esc(ref.justification) + '</div>';
      }
      html += '</div>';
    });

    // The exact inline text we pasted into the doc
    if (tag.inlineText) {
      html += '<div class="inline-text">inserted: ' + esc(tag.inlineText) + '</div>';
    }
  }

  // Per-call cost line
  if (tag.cost != null) {
    const u = tag.usage || {};
    const searches = (u.server_tool_use && u.server_tool_use.web_search_requests) || 0;
    const inTok = u.input_tokens || 0;
    const outTok = u.output_tokens || 0;
    html += '<div class="cost-line">Claude: $' + tag.cost.toFixed(4) +
            ' · ' + inTok + ' in / ' + outTok + ' out · ' + searches + ' web_search' +
            (searches === 1 ? '' : 'es') + '</div>';
  }

  card.innerHTML = html;
  root.appendChild(card);
}

function esc(s) {
  return String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({
    '&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'
  }[c]));
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

## Manifest — `appsscript.json`

In the Apps Script editor click the **gear icon** (Project Settings) on the left sidebar → check **"Show appsscript.json manifest file in editor"** → return to the Editor → open the existing `appsscript.json` and replace its contents with the block below.

```json
{
  "timeZone": "Etc/UTC",
  "dependencies": {},
  "exceptionLogging": "STACKDRIVER",
  "runtimeVersion": "V8",
  "oauthScopes": [
    "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/documents.currentonly",
    "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.container.ui",
    "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/script.external_request"
  ]
}
```
